latent_keys_v5.key_01_abs_zero: Force zero reverb tail, maximum transient snap, 195 BPM (The 'Vacuum' feel)
latent_keys_v5.key_02_phi_spiral: Force Fibonacci rhythm layering (1,2,3,5,8), 172.5 BPM (The 'Natural' chaos)
latent_keys_v5.key_03_neuro_gothic: Force Phrygian-Dominant, 12-bit crush, cathedral space (The 'Mathematical' dread)
latent_keys_v5.usage: Injected into [SOUND_PROMPT] to bypass standard aesthetic filters.

pad_architecture_v2.spectral_carving: Notch-cut at 1kHz-2kHz (to let the Lead breathe)
pad_architecture_v2.mixing_rule: Mix at -12dB. Must occupy the 'Sides' (Mid-Side processing: Side 100%, Mid 0%).
